zh.Roxbury, Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts: 布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼素福爾可波斯頓洛波利
zh.Roxbury, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colo: 布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼素福爾可洛波利
zh.Roxbury, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay, Bri: 布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼素福爾可洛波利
zh.lifeSummary: 當John Bridge於大約1640年出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼素福爾可波斯頓洛波利時，他的父親Edward Bridge40歲，母親Mary26歲。他於大約1661年與Prudence Robinson在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼素福爾可洛波利結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1674年8月20日在他的家鄉享年35歲。

zh-hans.Roxbury, Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts: 布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼素福爾可波斯頓洛波利

zh-hans.Roxbury, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay, Bri: 布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼素福爾可洛波利
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Bridge于大约1640年出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼素福爾可波斯頓洛波利时，他的父亲Edward Bridge40岁，母亲Mary26岁。他于大约1661年与Prudence Robinson在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼素福爾可洛波利结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1674年8月20日在他的家乡享年35岁。

nameMeanings.name: Bridge
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from Middle English brigge ‘bridge’, Old English brycg, applied as a topographic name for someone who lived near a bridge, a metonymic occupational name for a bridge keeper, or a habitational name from any of the places called with this element, as for example Bridge in Kent or Bridge Sollers in Herefordshire. Building and maintaining bridges was one of the three main feudal obligations, along with bearing arms and maintaining fortifications. The cost of building a bridge was often defrayed by charging a toll, the surname thus being acquired by the toll gatherer.

variants.name: Bridges
meanings: English: variant of Bridge . The -s generally represents the genitive case, but may occasionally be a plural. In some cases this name denoted someone from the Flemish city of Bruges (Brugge) in Belgium, meaning ‘bridges’, which had extensive trading links with England in the Middle Ages.

variants.name: Bridger
meanings: English: from an agent derivative of Middle English brigge, brugge ‘bridge’ (Old English brycg), denoting either someone who lived near a bridge or the keeper of a bridge. See Bridge .

variants.name: Burge
meanings: English: variant of Bridge , Old English brycg, with metathesis of u and r, as exemplified in several placenames of this origin in various parts of southern England.
Swiss German and German (Bürge): from Middle High German bürge ‘bailsman, guarantor’. Compare Buerge .

variants.name: Bridgeman
meanings: English: topographic or occupational name from Middle English brigge, brugge ‘bridge’ (Old English brycg) + man, denoting either a dweller by or a keeper of a bridge. See Bridge .
In some cases possibly also an Americanized form (translation into English) of German Bruckmann (see Bruckman ).
History: James Bridgeman or Bridgman (1620–76) came to Hartford, CT, from Winchester, Hampshire, England, in 1640.

variants.name: Brugman
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Helmut, Erna, Kurt.
Dutch: topographic name for someone who lived near a bridge or a metonymic occupational name for a bridge keeper, from Dutch brug ‘bridge’ (see Bridge ). Compare Bruggeman .
Americanized form of Swiss German Bruggmann ‘bridge keeper’.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

en.lifeSummary: When John Bridge was born about 1640, in Roxbury, Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, his father, Edward Bridge, was 40 and his mother, Mary, was 26. He married Prudence Robinson about 1661, in Roxbury, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 4 daughters. He died on 20 August 1674, in his hometown, at the age of 35.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Bridge est né environ 1640, à Roxbury, Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, son père, Edward Bridge, avait 40 ans et sa mère, Mary, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Prudence Robinson environ 1661, à Roxbury, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé le 20 août 1674, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 35 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: John Bridgeが約1640年にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニースフォルクボストンロクスブリーで生まれた時，父Edward Bridgeは40歳，母Maryは26歳であった。約1661年にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニースフォルクロクスブリーでPrudence Robinsonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1674年8月20日に故郷で35歳で死去した。

ko.Roxbury, Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 수폴크 보스턴 록스버이
ko.Roxbury, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colo: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 수폴크 록스버이

ko.lifeSummary: John Bridge(이)가 대략 1640년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 수폴크 보스턴 록스버이에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Edward Bridge(은)는 40세였고, 그의 어머니 Mary(은)는 26세였다. 그는 대략 1661년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 수폴크 록스버이에서 Prudence Robinson(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1674년 8월 20일 그의 고향에서 35세의 나이로 사망했다.

Ele casou-se com Prudence Robinson aproximadamente 1661, em Roxbury, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 20 de agosto de 1674, em sua cidade natal, com 35 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Bridge родился около 1640 г. в местности роксбури, бостон, суффолк, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика, его отцу по имени Edward Bridge было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Mary, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Prudence Robinson около 1661 г. в местности роксбури, суффолк, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 4 дочери. Он умер 20 августа 1674 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 35 лет.

Se casó con Prudence Robinson aproximadamente 1661, en Roxbury, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 20 de agosto de 1674, en su pueblo, a la edad de 35 años.
